easy.description: Easy tasks: Palindrome Check, Fibonacci, Valid Parentheses. All 164 HumanEval problems.

medium.description: Medium tasks: Decode Ways, Spiral Matrix, Unique Paths. All 164 HumanEval problems.

hard.description: Hard tasks: Decode Ways, Spiral Matrix, Unique Paths, Edit Distance. All 164 HumanEval problems.

very_hard.description: Very hard: novel LLM-generated tasks at medium difficulty (can't be memorized). All 164 HumanEval problems.

extremely_hard.description: Extremely hard: novel LLM-generated tasks at very_hard difficulty. All 164 HumanEval problems.

legendary.description: Legendary: novel LLM-generated tasks at legendary difficulty. All 164 HumanEval problems.

impossible.description: Impossible: novel LLM-generated tasks at impossible difficulty. All 164 HumanEval problems.

quick.description: Fast smoke-test: 3 medium seeds, 3 samples, no mutation, 10 HumanEval problems.
